github.name: GitHub
github.python_example:
from velane.integrations import integration
gh = integration('github')
user = gh.get('/user')
issue = gh.post('/repos/owner/repo/issues', {'title': 'Bug'})

gitlab.name: GitLab
gitlab.python_example:
from velane.integrations import integration
gl = integration('gitlab')
projects = gl.get('/projects')

slack.name: Slack
slack.python_example:
from velane.integrations import integration
slack = integration('slack')
slack.post('/chat.postMessage', {'channel': '#general', 'text': 'Hello!'})

salesforce.name: Salesforce
salesforce.python_example:
from velane.integrations import integration
sf = integration('salesforce')
case = sf.post('/services/data/v60.0/sobjects/Case', {'Subject': 'Issue', 'Status': 'New'})

hubspot.name: HubSpot
hubspot.python_example:
from velane.integrations import integration
hs = integration('hubspot')
contacts = hs.get('/crm/v3/objects/contacts')

notion.name: Notion
notion.python_example:
from velane.integrations import integration
notion = integration('notion')
results = notion.post('/search', {'query': 'meeting notes'})

linear.name: Linear

common_endpoints.description: GraphQL endpoint — all Linear operations use GraphQL

linear.python_example:
from velane.integrations import integration
linear = integration('linear')
data = linear.post('/graphql', {'query': 'mutation { issueCreate(input: {title: "Bug", teamId: "TEAM_ID"}) { success } }'})

jira.name: Jira
jira.python_example:
from velane.integrations import integration
jira = integration('jira')
issue = jira.post('/issue', {'fields': {'project': {'key': 'PROJ'}, 'summary': 'Bug', 'issuetype': {'name': 'Bug'}}})

google-calendar.name: Google Calendar
google-calendar.python_example:
from velane.integrations import integration
cal = integration('google-calendar')
events = cal.get('/calendars/primary/events')

google-sheets.name: Google Sheets
google-sheets.python_example:
from velane.integrations import integration
sheets = integration('google-sheets')
data = sheets.get('/spreadsheets/SHEET_ID/values/Sheet1!A1:D10')

gmail.name: Gmail
gmail.python_example:
from velane.integrations import integration
gmail = integration('gmail')
messages = gmail.get('/users/me/messages?q=is:unread')

stripe.name: Stripe
stripe.python_example:
from velane.integrations import integration
stripe = integration('stripe')
customers = stripe.get('/customers')

zendesk.name: Zendesk
zendesk.python_example:
from velane.integrations import integration
zd = integration('zendesk')
tickets = zd.get('/tickets')

intercom.name: Intercom
intercom.python_example:
from velane.integrations import integration
ic = integration('intercom')
contacts = ic.get('/contacts')

airtable.name: Airtable
airtable.python_example:
from velane.integrations import integration
at = integration('airtable')
records = at.get('/BASE_ID/TableName')

pipedrive.name: Pipedrive
pipedrive.python_example:
from velane.integrations import integration
pd = integration('pipedrive')
deals = pd.get('/deals')
